details.content: We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

about_item: Save Space Barn Door: Our dog furniture crate features a unique sliding barn door design that not only saves space but also adds charm and beauty. The side door is equipped with a multi-lock, providing easy access for your dog while ensuring excellent firmness and stability. It can be placed in living room, bedroom, and is definitely the ideal dog house for your furry friend!

Anti-Chew & Anti-Escape: We understand the importance of keeping your furry friend. That's why our dog kennel furniture is designed to be anti-chew and anti-escape. The edges of the boards are not exposed to the dog to avoid chewing on the boards, 0.4-inch steel tubes and double welded points make this large dog crate chew-proof and escape-proof!

Wide Application: Our wood dog crate furniture is not just a comfortable resting place for your dog. Its modern country-style furniture design also can be used as a coffee table in your living room, a TV cabinet, or even a bedside table in your bedroom. The stylish design blends with any interior, giving your furry family member a more comfortable life

Superior Material: Our wooden dog crate furniture is built to last. The boards are made of excellent chipboard with wear-resistant and easy-to-clean surface, and the tubes are made of steel with strength better than iron wire, ensuring its strength and durability. With a maximum weight capacity of 220 lbs, you can rest assured that it can accommodate your dog comfortablely
How to Choose Size: Interior size 29.3L x 19W x 22.6H inches, this dog crate fits for small dogs like Chihuahua, Pug, Pomeranian, Poodle.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate attractive, easy to assemble, and appreciate its quality and sturdiness. The size is roomy enough for small dogs, and they consider it good value for money. The sliding door receives mixed feedback - while many find it awesome, some note that the front gate doesn't open all the way.

authors_reviews.title: Great quality and beautiful kennel
authors_reviews.text: We are so pleased with these dog kennels! We bought two of them. One small and one large. They exceeded our expectations. They are very well made. I love the barn door! The pups love their new kennels. And they look so great in the house! Way better than the wire crates. The assembly was easy and instructions were straight forward. The locks and latches are perfect. Definitely worth every penny.Oh, and they arrived quicker than the expected delivery date!
authors_reviews.author: steven webb

authors_reviews.title: Stylish, Functional & Pup-Approved!
authors_reviews.text: I’m so happy with this dog kennel! Not only is it the perfect little home for my pup, but it also doubles as a sleek furniture piece that blends beautifully with my living room decor. It doesn’t look like a bulky cage — instead, it looks like a modern side table!🐾 My dog loves it! She feels safe and cozy inside with her blankets and toys.🛋️ Looks great – It fits seamlessly next to my couch and adds extra surface space on top for decor or essentials.🛠️ Sturdy and easy to assemble – The quality is solid and the finish is smooth and clean.📏 Perfect size – Compact but roomy enough for my small dog to stretch out comfortably.
authors_reviews.author: Brittany Freeman

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful modern and sturdy dog crate
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this crate! It is spacious (has enough room for my 3 small dogs), and very attractive. I love that it is tall and has a modern look. 10/10 would recommend! Building it is straightforward. You need a screw driver (drill preferred). With my lack of carpentry skills and ADHD, it took me a little bit to put together.It is BEAUTIFUL!!! Totally worth the purchase. You won’t regret it!
authors_reviews.author: Maggie Stecher

authors_reviews.title: Good quality and good looking, a little challenging to assemble.
authors_reviews.text: I got the smallest white crate with black doors and brown top. It is very nice looking, sturdy, and has plenty of room for my shi-tzu mix dog to stand and stretch out. I had to assemble it alone, which I have to say as a not so strong 68 year old woman was a small challenge. It comes with extra of all the various screws, nuts and pegs, which is nice. You really have to pay attention to the manual for assembly. It is picture only, no words, and you get a lot of different sizes of screws, with lots of holes on each piece to locate. The barn door assembly was easy to figure out, but somewhat difficult to screw in, as you have to work between the small bars. All little headaches aside, I got it together, and it looks great. I recommend it.
authors_reviews.author: Debra

authors_reviews.title: Perfect but had trouble w the lock hinge. The grey is not grey!
authors_reviews.text: Good size for a 15lb dog (roomy for a small terrier mix)Water resistantScratch resistant so farWell made and sturdyDecent locks that could likely be replaced if neededEasy to clean everything but the sliding door might be difficult to cleanCame as picturedWorth the price overallIt’s the perfect kennel for me! I got the kennel for my pup to grow into so it’s a little big right now but her bed fits great! It is NOT GREY! The product photo shows a light grey but, trust the photos in the comments! it is more like a rustic grey brown. It matches my room perfectly. If you walked in my room you would probably think the room is a deep cool brown, no red or warm tones. Assembly was super easy we build it same day. Couldn’t be more than 3 hours depending on how easy it is for you to assemble most things. (Sounds like a lot but times flies when your focused on a “big” project like this) The only issue we had was with the lock hinge on the sliding door. The hinges pre designated holes were the slightest bit too low I think and once we got the sliding door on we noticed the hinge was crooked and a little out of place so we couldn’t actually lock it. We unscrewed the hinge and fit it to the lock and then re screwed them in and it’s great. Overall a great product so far. I’m not the best at measuring but hopefully the pictures give you a good real life estimate of the size.It came with plenty of extra parts and even a really cool magnetic screwdriver that I’ll definitely be keeping forever.My dog has gotten bigger now and has occasionally scratched at the inside and it’s still in good condition. She did pee inside it (we don’t want her doing that but we didn’t realize she had to go and used it to go pee in the middle of the night. We have coyotes so we don’t really let her out to pee by herself.) thankfully? We have lots of blankets in there for her so that soaked it all up. Without any bedding the pee probably would have gotten into the crack for the sliding door and would have been hell to clean, if not stayed there forever. I think even a puppy pad would risk this, just something to consider if you do happen to be training your dog to pee in there.I have been using this nonstop without a coaster and it is holding up amazingly. No rings and there’s no raising of wood that you’ll see on certain woods. Overall good water resistance and scratch resistance.
authors_reviews.author: hailstorm

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfetto
other_countries_reviews.text: Articolo perfetto, molto resistente e bello. Istruzioni dettagliate e semplici per il montaggio. Consegna veloce e venditore gentile e disponibile. Sono molto soddisfatto e lo consiglio.
other_countries_reviews.author: Marco F.

other_countries_reviews.title: A good solid furniture crate
other_countries_reviews.text: It took a little while to arrive, but we anticipated this and ordered in good time. We ordered the 100cm size. Packaged well as flat pack furniture. Instruction booklet is straight forward and was able to put it together without any issues in maybe an hour or so. Would be quicker with more than one person. Parts and screws etc are labelled with letters or numbers which is useful. The box also includes a screwdriver and tools so you don’t need anything else, it’s all included. The crate itself feels solid and thick. It’s quite weighty so may need two people to move it. It looks good, like a real piece of furniture which was important to us as we don’t like the appearance of traditional crates. The sliding door is smooth and the clap and locks work perfectly. The crate opens on two sides. It rolls open at the front, and opens like a door on the left. Overall, really pleased with the quality. I can’t fault it. It’s exactly how it looks in the picture, although ever so slightly darker brown on the top. I’d go as far as saying it exceeds my expectations. Definitely would recommend. It’s good value for the quality.
other_countries_reviews.author: mercerbell

other_countries_reviews.title: ELEGANTE Y BUENA CALIDAD
other_countries_reviews.text: Está muy bien hecho, es confortable para la mascota y bonito para un hueco del salón. Ideal la blanca, la de la encimera marrón oscuro demasiado multicolor para mi gusto, quizás blanca con barrotes negros me gustase más. Yo lo recomiendo sin dudarlo!!!
other_countries_reviews.author: Lu

other_countries_reviews.title: Good quality piece of furniture
other_countries_reviews.text: Very good quality, looks great, detailed instructions were helpful putting it together.
other_countries_reviews.author: tracy lambe

other_countries_reviews.title: Top
other_countries_reviews.text: Top qualité, design super pour un intérieur.Je recommande
other_countries_reviews.author: Lupcin Virginie
